name: Update Tile Entity
desc: Updates NBT data for a tile entity (sign, skull, beacon, command block, etc.).

implementation.overview: S35 updates tile entity NBT data. Sent when signs change, skulls get named, beacons update. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S35PacketUpdateTileEntity)
modules.purpose: Server sends S35PacketUpdateTileEntity to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
